summary_text: ### Findings vs Phase 3 (`fugue-v2-spec.md`) - **Phase 3 spec requirements are not fully met yet** (`/Users/masayuki/.claude/cache/fugue-v2-spec.md:101-110`). - `fugue-lane-bridge.mjs` already has the core guard checks inside `handleMatrix` and uses runId-aware phase evidence for matrix runs (`/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:688-700`), and it returns `2` on hard blocks (`/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:702-706`, `:709-713`, `:719`, `:747-809`). - `--validate` is **not implemented** in the bridge CLI: not in parser, not in usage, and not in dispatch (`/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:78-85`, `:88-134`, `:834-852`). - `--validate` CLI check returns usage error (`exit 1`) in both repo and live bridge (`/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:1-1`, `/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:1-1`). - `phase-tracker.sh` is currently â€śrecord-onlyâ€ť and does not invoke bridge validation (`/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/hooks/phase-tracker.sh:73-78`, `:80-90`), despite spec asking update for `--validate`. - Phase evidence written by phase-tracker is unscoped (no `runId`) (`/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/hooks/phase-tracker.sh:73-77`), so it cannot satisfy run-scoped validation checks that use `matrix.runId` (`/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/guard.js:87-90`, `:108-110`) unless a runId is absent. - Live guard config path is still not wired to the loaded path: `loadGuardConfig` reads `~/.claude/docs/lane-guard.json` (`/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/guard.js:11`), but production has no such file; effective config lives at `~/.claude/assets/docs/lane-guard.json` (`/Users/masayuki/.claude/assets/docs/lane-guard.json:1`). ### Minimal safe patch set to complete Phase 3 1. **Add explicit `--validate` CLI to bridge** - Update usage text and arg parsing to accept `--validate` (`/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:78-85`, `:88-134`). - Add `handleValidate(args)` that runs the same preflight checks as `handleMatrix` (matrix JSON parse, `validateDiversity`, `validatePhaseEvidence(..., matrix.runId)`, schema/lane checks) and returns `2` on hard blocks, `0` on pass. - Route in `main()` before matrix execution (`/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:834-852`). 2. **Wire phase-tracker to call it** - In `~/.claude/hooks/phase-tracker.sh` (`/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/hooks/phase-tracker.sh:49-60`, `:73-78`), add guarded `node ~/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs --validate --matrix <extracted-matrix-path>` only for bash invocations that include fugue matrix dispatch. - Keep hook non-blocking (`|| true`) if current policy is â€śalways exit 0â€ť. 3. **Fix lane-guard v2 config source of truth in live** - Ensure runtime file exists at `~/.claude/docs/lane-guard.json` (copy/sync from `~/.claude/assets/docs/lane-guard.json`) so `guard.js` actually loads the v2 policy (`/Users/masayuki/.claude/assets/docs/lane-guard.json:1`, `/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/guard.js:11`). 4. **Add/extend tests in `/tmp/phase0-1c8023`** - Extend `assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-integration-bridge-spawn.mjs` with `--validate` cases: - valid matrix â†’ exit 0 - diversity violation â†’ exit 2 - tier 3 with missing scoped evidence (runId mismatch) â†’ exit 2 - Current suite already has matrix and scoped evidence tests, but none exercise `--validate` directly (`/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-integration-bridge-spawn.mjs:30-70`, `:38-44`). 5. **(Optional hardening, low-risk)** - If you rely on run-scoped validation from hook-driven checks, include `runId`...
